sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; const StudentDashboard = () => { const [darkMode] = useState(false); const [info, setInfo] = useState({}); const [error, setError] = useState(''); const username = localStorage.getItem('username'); const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken'); useEffect(() => { fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/student-info/', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, }) .then(res => res.json()) .then(data =>{ console.log("STUDENT INFO RESPONSE:", data); setInfo(data); }) .catch(() => setError('Failed to fetch student info.')); }, []); return (

📊 School Management Dashboard

Hi, {username} 👋

Welcome, {username}

{error &&

{error}

}
👤 My Info

Email: {info.email || 'Loading...'}

Class: {info.classroom || 'N/A'}

Subjects: {(info.subjects || []).join(', ') || 'No subjects yet'}

📘 Subjects

View your subjects.

🏫 Classrooms

View your classroom arrangement.

📅 Timetable

View class schedules.

✅ Attendance

Track daily attendance records.

🏅 Grades

View your grades.

); }; export default StudentDashboard;
